name: nagini
description: Python in the browser via Pyodide/Brython with a worker-based architecture

scripts.build: npm run build:worker && npm run build:umd
scripts.docs:api: jsdoc2md --configure jsdoc.conf.json --files src/nagini.js src/pyodide/manager/manager.js src/pyodide/manager/manager-static-execution.js src/pyodide/manager/manager-input.js src/pyodide/manager/manager-fs.js src/pyodide/file-loader/file-loader.js src/brython/manager/manager.js src/brython/manager/executor.js src/brython/manager/loader.js src/utils/validation.js src/utils/createBlobWorker.js > docs/api-reference.md
